title: The Reason Why (Syria) Was Unified under [Mu 'awiyah
description: [Mu'awiyahJ It was transmitted to me in writing by al-Sari -Shu'ayb-Sayf'Abd al-Malik, al-Rabi', Abu Mujalid, Abu 'Uthman, and Abu Harithah: When Abu'Ubaydah died, he named 'Iyad b. Ghanm to succeed him in his governorship ('amal). 'Iyad was [both] his maternal uncle and the son of his father 's brother. ('Iyad) had been governor (waliya 'amalan) in the Jazirah, but'Umar b. al-Khattab 128661 had deposed him. So he attached himself to Abu 'Ubaydah in Syria and remained with him.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 15
